title: paspalum convexum
intro: Paspalum convexum, also known as the convex paspalum or rough grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Paspalum convexum include its ability to treat fever, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Paspalum convexum is often used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, although its use and efficacy may require further scientific research.
